entities.description: Increase in population driving market opportunities for food producers

entities.name: EPIDEMICS
entities.description: Widespread occurrence of infectious diseases affecting the region

entities.name: VOLATILE MARKETS
entities.description: Unstable market prices and demand for food and feed

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INNOVATIONS
entities.description: New technologies and practices required for agricultural transformation

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The fundamental change in agricultural systems to meet regional challenges

entities.name: POLICY REFORMS

entities.description: An approach to agriculture that increases productivity and resilience to climate change

entities.name: PUBLIC-PRIVATE-PARTNERSHIPS

entities.name: WOMEN

entities.name: POVERTY REDUCTION

entities.name: PRIVATE SECTOR
entities.description: The part of the economy not under direct government control, critical for agro-industrialization

entities.name: R4D

entities.description: Specific technological tools used to achieve climate resilience
